query: SELECT sessionId, COUNT(*) as message_count, MIN(createdAt) as first_message, MAX(createdAt) as last_message FROM chat_messages GROUP BY sessionId ORDER BY first_message DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT sessionId, COUNT(*) as message_count, MIN(createdAt) as first_message, MAX(createdAt) as last_message FROM chat_messages GROUP BY sessionId ORDER BY first_message DESC;
